arts.ttl: Hansi Flick provides positive Marc-Andre Ter Stegen update, sends message to Ansu Fati
arts.sum: It has been a very good start to 2025 for Barcelona, who will hope to carry on their form at the Ramon Sanchez-Pizjuan against Sevilla on Sunday. The players that Hansi Flick relies upon in Andalusia will be interesting to note, given that there has been some changes in recent weeks. arts.ttl: Barcelona make SHOCK contract decision after Flick statement
arts.sum: Barcelona are considering extending Wojciech Szczesny's contract beyond this season, according to Spanish media. In September, Barcelona's No.1 goalkeeper Marc-Andre Ter Stegen suffered a season-ending injury, leaving the Catalans with Inaki Pena as their only senior shot-stopper.

arts.ttl: ‘I love working for this club’ - Flick opens up on Barça future
arts.sum: As Barcelona remain in contention to win four trophies this season and are playing some of the best football in their recent history, there’s zero doubt that choosing Hansi Flick as the head coach was a great decision by Joan Laporta last summer. One season and two [overall] years for a coach is a long time.”

arts.ttl: Barcelona star confirms Hansi Flick played a ‘very important’ role in his decision to stay

arts.ttl: Barcelona alter stance on Wojciech Szczęsny’s future for next season
arts.sum: The brass at La Liga giants Barcelona have opened up to the possibility of extending Wojciech Szczęsny’s stay with the club beyond the summer. That’s according to Diario Sport, who…

arts.ttl: Hansi Flick confirms one change in Barcelona XI to face Sevilla
arts.sum: Barcelona head coach Hansi Flick has confirmed a planned change in his line-up to face Sevilla. Barca are of course primed to return to action on Sunday, when the Blaugrana…

arts.ttl: Barcelona players didn’t want club to sign Manchester United star this January
arts.sum: There were reportedly a few Barcelona players who were not keen on the club signing Manchester United misfit Marcus Rashford this January. The England international ended up leaving Man Utd for a loan move to Aston Villa this winter, and he also had a number of other clubs interested in him before his future was […] The post Barcelona players didn’t want club to sign Manchester United star this January appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: ‘He is on the right path’ - Flick offers Ansu Fati hope of return
arts.sum: It is indisputable that Barcelona coach Hansi Flick has had a positive impact on every single one of his players since taking over last summer, but there is one glaring exception: Ansu Fati. Flick was asked about Fati in a press conference on Saturday and gave a positive update on Ansu, saying he’s improving and trying his hardest to earn a spot in the team.

arts.ttl: Arsenal transfer news: Gunners failed with £16.7m winter bid for Barcelona attacker?
arts.sum: Arsenal were reportedly one of four teams to fail with in their efforts to sign a Barcelona attacker in the winter transfer window.
